title: Configure Trusted Host Patterns
description: Restrict which hostnames can access the site to prevent HTTP Host Header attacks.

implementation.apache: In settings.php: $settings['trusted_host_patterns'] = ['^example\.com$', '^.+\.example\.com$']

verification: Accessing via IP or fake Host header shows trusted_hosts error

title: Change Default Admin Path
description: Change /admin to a custom path via configuration or contrib modules to reduce brute force exposure.

implementation.apache: Install Rename Admin Paths module; configure custom /manage or /control path
implementation.nginx: Same module approach or nginx rewrite

verification: Accessing /admin returns 404 or redirect; new path works for admin login

title: Protect settings.php File
description: settings.php contains database credentials. Ensure it is not readable.

implementation.apache: chmod 440 sites/default/settings.php; chown www-data:www-data sites/default/settings.php

verification: Direct access to settings.php returns 403; file permissions are 440

title: Disable Error Display in Production
description: Verbose errors reveal paths, queries, and server details. Log errors instead of displaying.

implementation.apache: settings.php: $config['system.logging']['error_level'] = 'hide'; error_reporting = 0

verification: Access nonexistent path; generic message shown, no path or query disclosure

title: Set Secure File Permissions
description: Files 644, directories 755. settings.php and services.yml should be 440. web root 555 if possible.

implementation.apache: chmod -R 644 /var/www/html/*; chmod -R 755 /var/www/html/*; chmod 440 sites/default/settings.php

verification: ls -la shows 644 files, 755 dirs, 440 settings.php

title: Enable Twig Autoescape
description: Ensure Twig autoescape is enabled to prevent XSS from unfiltered user input in templates.

implementation.apache: In services.yml: twig.config: autoescape: true

verification: Custom template with {{ var }} auto-escapes HTML tags

title: Use Custom Database Table Prefix
description: Set custom prefix in settings.php to prevent SQLi enumeration via default table names.

implementation.apache: settings.php: 'prefix' => 'dp_xyz_',

verification: SHOW TABLES shows custom prefix, not default Drupal table names

title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
description: Require 2FA for admin accounts using TFA or WebAuthn modules.

implementation.apache: Install TFA module; configure TOTP for admin and editor roles
implementation.nginx: Same module setup via Drupal backend

verification: Admin login requires TOTP code after password entry

title: Force HTTPS and HSTS
description: Redirect HTTP to HTTPS at server level; enable HSTS; set $base_url to https in settings.php.

implementation.apache: RewriteCond HTTPS off -> RewriteRule ^ https://...; settings.php: $base_url = 'https://example.com'

verification: http:// redirects to https://; HSTS header present

title: Configure HTTP Security Headers
description: Add X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, CSP.

implementation.apache: Header set X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN; Header set X-Content-Type-Options nosniff
implementation.nginx: add_header X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN; add_header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff

verification: curl -I shows all security headers present

title: Audit and Remove Unused Modules
description: Uninstall unused contrib and custom modules. Keep core and contrib updated. Check for known CVEs.

implementation.apache: Extend > Uninstall unused modules; Extend > Available Updates for remaining

verification: Only required modules enabled; all at latest stable version

title: Secure Cron Configuration
description: Use server cron instead of web-based cron; protect cron key; restrict cron URL access.

implementation.apache: settings.php: $settings['cron_key'] = 'randomstring'; server cron: curl -s https://example.com/cron/randomstring
implementation.nginx: Same settings.php; add nginx location deny for /cron without key

verification: Cron runs only via server cron with correct key; direct /cron without key blocked

title: Enforce Strong Password Policy
description: Install Password Policy module to enforce minimum length, complexity, and expiration rules.

implementation.apache: Install Password Policy module; configure policy for admin roles: min 12 chars, complexity required
implementation.nginx: Same module setup via Drupal admin

verification: Create test user with weak password; system rejects it with policy message

title: Restrict Upload Types and Execution
description: Whitelist allowed extensions; scan uploads; prevent PHP execution in public file directories.

implementation.apache: Add .htaccess in sites/default/files: SetHandler Drupal_Security_Do_Not_Remove_See_SA_2006_006

verification: Upload PHP to files directory; access returns 403 Forbidden

title: Enable Database SSL Encryption
description: Configure encrypted database connections in settings.php to prevent data interception.

implementation.apache: settings.php: 'pdo' => [ PDO::MYSQL_ATTR_SSL_CA => '/path/to/ca.pem', PDO::MYSQL_ATTR_SSL_VERIFY_SERVER_CERT => true ]

verification: MySQL SHOW STATUS shows active SSL cipher for database connection

title: Configure Login Security and Brute Force Protection
description: Install Login Security module or configure flood control to block brute force attacks.

implementation.apache: Install Login Security module; set 5 failed attempts = 15 minute lockout; notify admin

verification: 5 failed logins trigger lockout; notification sent to admin email

title: Implement Content Security Policy
description: Use SecKit module or server config to enforce CSP and reduce XSS impact.

implementation.apache: Install SecKit; configure default-src self; script-src self trusted-cdn.com

verification: Browser dev tools show CSP header; no console violations

title: Configure Cache and Page Headers
description: Ensure sensitive pages are not cached by proxies/CDNs; set proper Cache-Control headers.

implementation.apache: settings.php: $config['system.performance']['cache']['page']['max_age'] = 0 for admin pages
implementation.nginx: Same settings.php configuration; add no-cache headers in admin location

verification: Admin pages show Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate

title: Set Session Lifetime and Regeneration
description: Limit session cookie lifetime; regenerate session ID on privilege changes; use database sessions.

implementation.apache: settings.php: ini_set('session.cookie_lifetime', 0); ini_set('session.gc_maxlifetime', 3600);

verification: Session expires after browser close or 1 hour inactivity

title: Implement Backup and Recovery Procedures
description: Automate daily database and file backups using Backup and Migrate module or server scripts.

implementation.apache: Install Backup and Migrate; schedule daily backups to S3 or offsite
implementation.nginx: Same module setup via Drupal admin

verification: Backup files exist with recent timestamps in storage location

title: Enable Update Notifications
description: Configure email notifications for core, module, and theme updates via Update Manager.

implementation.apache: Reports > Available Updates > Settings; configure notification email frequency

verification: Test notification email received when update is available

title: Restrict CORS for JSON:API and AJAX
description: Configure allowed origins for JSON:API endpoints and AJAX requests in CORS configuration.

implementation.apache: services.yml: cors.config: enabled: true; allowedOrigins: ['https://example.com']

verification: Cross-origin request from unauthorized domain returns 403 or no access headers

title: Rate Limit API and Login Endpoints
description: Apply rate limiting to JSON:API, login forms, and contact forms to prevent abuse.

implementation.apache: Install Rate Limit module; configure per-user and per-IP limits for API endpoints

verification: Requests beyond limit return 429 Too Many Requests

title: Replace Database Logging with Syslog
description: Disable dblog module to prevent database bloat and potential log injection; use syslog instead.

implementation.apache: Uninstall dblog; Install syslog; configure /var/log/drupal.log
implementation.nginx: Same - replace dblog with syslog module
implementation.linux: drush pm-uninstall dblog; drush en syslog

verification: dblog not in enabled modules list; syslog module active; /var/log/drupal.log exists

title: Add Honeypot Protection to Forms
description: Use Honeypot module to add hidden fields and time limits to forms to block spam bots.

implementation.apache: Install Honeypot module; enable on all forms with 5 second minimum time limit

verification: Bot submissions with instant form fill are rejected; legitimate users pass

title: Disable Unneeded REST Resources
description: Disable default JSON:API and REST resources that expose user or content data unnecessarily.

implementation.apache: Configuration > Web Services > REST; disable /user/{user} GET and non-essential endpoints

verification: Disabled REST endpoints return 404 or 403 when accessed

title: Restrict Admin Toolbar Access
description: Ensure Admin Toolbar is only accessible to users with access toolbar permission; disable caching.

implementation.apache: Permissions > Admin Toolbar: assign only to administrator and editor roles

verification: User without toolbar permission sees no admin links in frontend menu

title: Isolate Multisite Databases and Files
description: If running multisite, separate databases, use unique prefixes, and restrict cross-site file access.

implementation.apache: sites.php: configure separate database credentials per site; unique private files directory
implementation.linux: ls /var/www/html/sites/ shows directory per site with separate files/ and settings.php

verification: Site A cannot read files or database of Site B through web requests
